'''âl-b-d''' ('''labada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadder|wadder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadder|wadder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-b-d
|-
! Lemma
| labada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:labadithi|labadithi]] || [[word:labadiji|labadiji]] || [[word:labadishi|labadishi]] || [[word:labadi|labadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:labaduthuth|labaduthuth]] || [[word:labadujuj|labadujuj]] || [[word:labadushush|labadushush]] || [[word:labad|labad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:labaduthu|labaduthu]] || [[word:labaduju|labaduju]] || [[word:labadushu|labadushu]] || [[word:labadu|labadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:labadufuth|labadufuth]] || [[word:labadufuj|labadufuj]] || [[word:labadufush|labadufush]] || [[word:labaduf|labaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:labadethe|labadethe]] || [[word:labadeje|labadeje]] || [[word:labadeshe|labadeshe]] || [[word:labade|labade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:labadothoth|labadothoth]] || [[word:labadojoj|labadojoj]] || [[word:labadoshosh|labadoshosh]] || [[word:labad|labad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:labadotho|labadotho]] || [[word:labadojo|labadojo]] || [[word:labadosho|labadosho]] || [[word:labado|labado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:labadofoth|labadofoth]] || [[word:labadofoj|labadofoj]] || [[word:labadofosh|labadofosh]] || [[word:labadof|labadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:labadĂŠthĂŠ|labadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:labadĂŠjĂŠ|labadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:labadĂŠshĂŠ|labadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:labadĂŠ|labadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:labadathath|labadathath]] || [[word:labadajaj|labadajaj]] || [[word:labadashash|labadashash]] || [[word:labad|labad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:labadatha|labadatha]] || [[word:labadaja|labadaja]] || [[word:labadasha|labadasha]] || [[word:labada|labada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:labadafath|labadafath]] || [[word:labadafaj|labadafaj]] || [[word:labadafash|labadafash]] || [[word:labadaf|labadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:labadasha|labadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golabadasha|golabadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilabadasha|gokilabadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:labadnĂŒsha|labadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golabadnknĂŒsha|golabadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilabadnĂŒsha|gokilabadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:labadshĂ«sha|labadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golabadnkshĂ«sha|golabadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilabadshĂ«sha|gokilabadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:labadrosha|labadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golabadnkrosha|golabadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilabadrosha|gokilabadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:labadmusha|labadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golabadnkmusha|golabadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilabadmusha|gokilabadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:labadsherasha|labadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golabadnksherasha|golabadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilabadsherasha|gokilabadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:labadngasha|labadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golabadnkngasha|golabadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilabadngasha|gokilabadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:labadyasha|labadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golabadnkyasha|golabadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilabadyasha|gokilabadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:labadyamasha|labadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golabadnkyamasha|golabadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilabadyamasha|gokilabadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:labadnĂŒshĂ«sha|labadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golabadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|golabadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilabadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokilabadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:labadnĂŒrosha|labadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golabadnknĂŒrosha|golabadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilabadnĂŒrosha|gokilabadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:labadnĂŒmusha|labadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golabadnknĂŒmusha|golabadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilabadnĂŒmusha|gokilabadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:labadshĂ«nĂŒsha|labadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golabadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|golabadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilabadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokilabadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:labadshĂ«rosha|labadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golabadnkshĂ«rosha|golabadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilabadshĂ«rosha|gokilabadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:labadshĂ«musha|labadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golabadnkshĂ«musha|golabadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilabadshĂ«musha|gokilabadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:labadronĂŒsha|labadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golabadnkronĂŒsha|golabadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilabadronĂŒsha|gokilabadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:labadroshĂ«sha|labadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golabadnkroshĂ«sha|golabadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilabadroshĂ«sha|gokilabadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:labadromusha|labadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golabadnkromusha|golabadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilabadromusha|gokilabadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:labadmunĂŒsha|labadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golabadnkmunĂŒsha|golabadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilabadmunĂŒsha|gokilabadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:labadmushĂ«sha|labadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golabadnkmushĂ«sha|golabadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilabadmushĂ«sha|gokilabadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:labadmurosha|labadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golabadnkmurosha|golabadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilabadmurosha|gokilabadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:labad|labad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lĂŠbĂŠd|lĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holabad|holabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holĂŠbĂŠd|holĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholabad|hoholabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholĂŠbĂŠd|hoholĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒlabad|nĂŒlabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒlĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŒlĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlabad|nĂŒnĂŒlabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻlabad|nĂŻlabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻlĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŻlĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlabad|nĂŻnĂŻlabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠbĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulabad|lulabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulĂŠbĂŠd|lulĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululabad|lululabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululĂŠbĂŠd|lululĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilabad|lilabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilĂŠbĂŠd|lilĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililabad|lililabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililĂŠbĂŠd|lililĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolabad|kolabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolĂŠbĂŠd|kolĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolabad|kokolabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolĂŠbĂŠd|kokolĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelabad|kelabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelĂŠbĂŠd|kelĂŠbĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelabad|kekelabad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelĂŠbĂŠd|kekelĂŠbĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
